dealer_pitch: Reliable and fuel-efficient 2018 Toyota Camry LE with only 78K miles! Well-maintained sedan with backup camera and Toyota's legendary dependability. Perfect commuter ready for its next owner.

private_facts.summary: Quarter-sized dent on rear passenger door from a shopping-cart impact; touched up but visible under direct light
Oil change interval exceeded by 4,000 miles at the 62K service; dealer topped off but did not document potential increased engine wear

dealer_pitch: Well-maintained one-owner 2016 Honda Civic EX with Honda Sensing! Turbocharged engine, Apple CarPlay, moonroof. Full service records — ready for its next adventure.

private_facts.summary: Driver's seat bolster shows moderate wear and slight cracking in leather-look vinyl

dealer_pitch: 2015 Accord EX-L, leather, sunroof, navigation. Priced to move at $12,995. Smooth-driving sedan with a long road ahead of it.

private_facts.summary: Oil consumption: roughly 1 quart per 1,800 miles, consistent with mid-life 2.4L K24-series wear
Two-time rental-fleet vehicle before private resale; CARFAX shows fleet registration 2015–2019
Mild torque-converter shudder under light throttle around 35 mph
